items.caption: A promotional graphic for a podcast called "the shared desk." it features three individuals posing together outdoors. on the left, there is a woman with red hair, smiling and crossing her arms. in the center, there is a man with short brown hair, also smiling. on the right, there is a woman with glasses, holding a cat in her arms, and she is also smiling. the background shows a park setting with trees and a fence. the text "two writers, one podcast, and various points-of-view." is overlaid on the image, indicating the content and format of the podcast.
a woman working her small shared office cubicle
